name: EdwNextPageMassAllExtr

sqlReaderQuery.value: WITH cte1 AS (SELECT DISTINCT MBR.TAX_YR, MBR.GRP_ID, MBR.SUB_ID, MBR.MBR_SFX_NO, MBR.MBR_FIRST_NM, MBR.MBR_MIDINIT, MBR.MBR_LAST_NM, MBR.MBR_ID, MBR.MBR_BRTH_DT, MBR.MBR_RELSHP_CD, SUB.SUB_HOME_ADDR_LN_1, SUB.SUB_HOME_ADDR_LN_2, SUB.SUB_HOME_ADDR_CITY_NM, SUB.SUB_HOME_ADDR_ST_CD, SUB.SUB_HOME_ADDR_ZIP_CD_5, SUB.SUB_HOME_ADDR_ZIP_CD_4, MBR.JAN_COV_IN, MBR.FEB_COV_IN, MBR.MAR_COV_IN, MBR.APR_COV_IN, MBR.MAY_COV_IN, MBR.JUN_COV_IN, MBR.JUL_COV_IN, MBR.AUG_COV_IN, MBR.SEP_COV_IN, MBR.OCT_COV_IN, MBR.NOV_COV_IN, MBR.DEC_COV_IN, TRIM(COV.PROD_CRBL_COV_CD) AS COV_CRDBLE_FLAG, CASE WHEN COV.PROD_CRBL_COV_CD='N' THEN 'N' ELSE MBR.FULL_YR_COV_IN END AS FULL_YR_COV_IN, MBR.CRCTN_IN, SUB.SUB_MAIL_ADDR_LN_1, SUB.SUB_MAIL_ADDR_LN_2, SUB.SUB_MAIL_ADDR_CITY_NM, SUB.SUB_MAIL_ADDR_ST_CD, SUB.SUB_MAIL_ADDR_ZIP_CD_5, SUB.SUB_MAIL_ADDR_ZIP_CD_4, GRP.GRP_NM FROM @{pipeline().globalParameters.gbl_param_EDWOwner}.GRP_MA_DOR_D GRP INNER JOIN @{pipeline().globalParameters.gbl_param_EDWOwner}.SUB_MA_DOR_D SUB ON GRP.GRP_MA_DOR_SK = SUB.GRP_MA_DOR_SK INNER JOIN @{pipeline().globalParameters.gbl_param_EDWOwner}.MBR_MA_DOR_D MBR ON SUB.SUB_MA_DOR_SK = MBR.SUB_MA_DOR_SK INNER JOIN @{pipeline().globalParameters.gbl_param_EDWOwner}.MBR_MA_DOR_COV_F COV ON MBR.MBR_MA_DOR_SK = COV.MBR_MA_DOR_SK WHERE MBR.LAST_UPDT_RUN_CYC_EXCTN_DT_SK > '@{pipeline().parameters.LastUpdRunDt}') SELECT cte1.TAX_YR AS Tax_Year, CAST(@{pipeline().globalParameters.gbl_param_EDWOwner}.GetDateCST() AS DATE) AS Extract_Generation_Date, cte1.GRP_ID AS Group_ID, cte1.SUB_ID AS Subscriber_ID, cte1.MBR_SFX_NO AS Member_Suffix, cte1.MBR_FIRST_NM AS Member_First_Name, cte1.MBR_MIDINIT AS Member_Middle_Initial, cte1.MBR_LAST_NM AS Member_Last_Name, cte1.MBR_BRTH_DT AS Date_of_Birth, cte1.MBR_RELSHP_CD AS Member_Relationship_Code, cte1.SUB_HOME_ADDR_LN_1 AS Home_Address_Line_1, cte1.SUB_HOME_ADDR_LN_2 AS Home_Address_Line_2, cte1.SUB_HOME_ADDR_CITY_NM AS Home_Address_City, cte1.SUB_HOME_ADDR_ST_CD AS Home_Address_State, cte1.SUB_HOME_ADDR_ZIP_CD_5 AS Home_Address_Zip_5, CASE WHEN cte1.SUB_HOME_ADDR_ZIP_CD_4 = '0000' THEN '' ELSE cte1.SUB_HOME_ADDR_ZIP_CD_4 END AS Home_Address_Zip_4, cte1.JAN_COV_IN AS January_Indicator, cte1.FEB_COV_IN AS February_Indicator, cte1.MAR_COV_IN AS March_Indicator, cte1.APR_COV_IN AS April_Indicator, cte1.MAY_COV_IN AS May_Indicator, cte1.JUN_COV_IN AS June_Indicator, cte1.JUL_COV_IN AS July_Indicator, cte1.AUG_COV_IN AS August_Indicator, cte1.SEP_COV_IN AS September_Indicator, cte1.OCT_COV_IN AS October_Indicator, cte1.NOV_COV_IN AS November_Indicator, cte1.DEC_COV_IN AS December_Indicator, cte1.COV_CRDBLE_FLAG AS Coverage_Is_Credible, cte1.FULL_YR_COV_IN AS Covered_Full_Year, cte1.CRCTN_IN AS Coverage_Corrected, cte1.SUB_MAIL_ADDR_LN_1 AS Mail_Address_Line_1, cte1.SUB_MAIL_ADDR_LN_2 AS Mail_Address_Line_2, cte1.SUB_MAIL_ADDR_CITY_NM AS Mail_Address_City, cte1.SUB_MAIL_ADDR_ST_CD AS Mail_Address_State, cte1.SUB_MAIL_ADDR_ZIP_CD_5 AS Mail_Address_Zip_5, CASE WHEN cte1.SUB_MAIL_ADDR_ZIP_CD_4 = '0000' THEN '' ELSE cte1.SUB_MAIL_ADDR_ZIP_CD_4 END AS Mail_Address_Zip_4, cte1.GRP_NM AS Group_Name FROM cte1

Description:
Â© Copyright 2020 Blue Cross/Blue Shield of Kansas City

CALLED BY : 'EdwNextPageFTPSeq

PROCESSING :  Extracts data from EDW and creates the output file for Nextpage

MODIFICATIONS :

Developer                                 Date                 \(9)Project                                                Change Description                                               \(9)Development Project\(9)Code Reviewer          Date Reviewed       
------------------                               --------------------     \(9)------------------------                             -----------------------------------------------------------------------             \(9)------------------------------\(9)         -------------------------------   ----------------------------       
Sethuraman Rajendran           \(9) 2018-06-05\(9)5839\(9)                                          Original Programming\(9)\(9)\(9)          \(9)EnterpriseDev2                       Kalyan Neelam           2018-06-12
Abhiram Dasarathy\(9)\(9)2019-12-24\(9)F-114877\(9)\(9)Added lookup to filter on the Group Category to create filename\(9)EnterpriseDev2\(9)               Jaideep Mankala        12/26/2019
Debdeep Saha                        2020-12-01              US296752               Added condition on monthly Indicator as per the acceptance criteria      EnterpriseDev2         Jaideep Mankala     12/18/2020
Deepika C                               2023-01-25              US  557759             Update EDWMassAllExtr SQL to use                                                       EnterpriseDev2                 Jeyaprasanna                 2023-01-25
                                                                                                 WHERE MBR.LAST_UPDT_RUN_CYC_EXCTN_DT_SK > '#LastUpdRunDt#' 
                                                                                                    instead of >= so that old records are not extracted. 
                                                                                                   Added Distinct to select statement to avoid duplicates when member had multiple coverage

Annotations:
EDWMassAllExtrToNextpage - Extracts data from EDW and creates the output file for Nextpage
Extract Data from All the four tables to create the output file for Nextpage
Edit data and format into Output (Nextpage) format
Create the output file EdwMassToNextPage
